name: Herrera Family
text: We were very worried after the IRS told us we did not qualify for tax credits for our daughters. WM Servicios Hispanos reviewed our case, helped us submit a dispute, and everything changed. In the end, we received a refund of $11,345. We are very grateful for their help and professionalism.

name: Luis Contreras
text: I did not know if I was going to receive anything this year, but thanks to WM Servicios Hispanos I got a refund of $1,826 from the IRS. They explained everything clearly and made the process simple for me. I highly recommend their services.

name: Jesús Hernández
text: After a long process, I finally received my work permit and Social Security. Now I have better opportunities and can work legally in the United States. WM Servicios Hispanos guided me step by step and gave me confidence throughout the process.

name: Maira Parra
text: I had to leave my country because of political persecution and arrived in the United States with uncertainty. With the help of WM Servicios Hispanos, I was able to obtain my work permit and Social Security. Today I feel safer and more stable thanks to their support.

name: Mirla Cumaná
text: After a car accident, I lost my vehicle and felt overwhelmed. Thankfully, my insurance worked exactly as it should. With the guidance I received, I was able to get a replacement vehicle and move forward. I am very thankful for the support and clear explanations I received.

name: Ricardo Rico
text: I had an emergency surgery that could have cost me more than $40,000. Thanks to my health insurance, I was able to receive the treatment I needed without facing that financial burden. I truly understand now how important it is to have the right coverage.
